name: gen_ai.client.operation.duration
description: GenAI operation duration.

name: gen_ai.client.token.usage
description: Number of input and output tokens used.

description: Time to receive the first chunk from a streaming response.

name: gen_ai.client.operation.time_per_output_chunk
description: Time elapsed between streamed output chunks after the first chunk.

description: The end-to-end duration of a single agent invocation.

description: The duration of a single tool execution.

description: Number of tool invocations by tool name and outcome.

description: Tool execution latency.

name: github.copilot.agent.turn.count
description: Number of LLM round-trips per agent invocation.

name: github.copilot.mcp.server.connection.count
description: Number of completed MCP server connection attempts by transport and outcome.
